preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps contra Sporting Kansas City: 'Siempre podemos contar con Berhalter', dice Sorensen
preReview.description: Los Vancouver Whitecaps buscarán volver a la cima de la Conferencia Oeste cuando reciban a Sporting Kansas City este fin de semana.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps x Sporting Kansas City: 'Podemos sempre confiar em Berhalter', diz Sorensen
preReview.description: O Vancouver Whitecaps buscará retornar ao topo da Conferência Oeste quando receber o Sporting Kansas City neste fim de semana.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps v Sporting Kansas City: 'Possiamo sempre contare su Berhalter', dice Sorensen
preReview.description: I Vancouver Whitecaps cercheranno di tornare al vertice della Western Conference quando ospiteranno lo Sporting Kansas City questo fine settimana.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps v Sporting Kansas City: 'We can always rely on Berhalter', says Sorensen
preReview.description: The Vancouver Whitecaps will look to return to the top of the Western Conference when they host Sporting Kansas City this weekend.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps contre Sporting Kansas City : 'Nous pouvons toujours compter sur Berhalter', déclare Sorensen
preReview.description: Les Vancouver Whitecaps chercheront à revenir en tête de la Conférence Ouest lorsqu'ils accueilleront le Sporting Kansas City ce week-end.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps gegen Sporting Kansas City: 'Wir können uns immer auf Berhalter verlassen', sagt Sorensen
preReview.description: Die Vancouver Whitecaps werden an diesem Wochenende versuchen, die Spitze der Western Conference zurückzuerobern, wenn sie Sporting Kansas City empfangen.

preReview.title: فانكوفر وايتكابس ضد سبورتينغ كانساس سيتي: 'يمكننا دائمًا الاعتماد على برهالتر'، يقول سورنسن
preReview.description: سيسعى فانكوفر وايتكابس للعودة إلى قمة المؤتمر الغربي عندما يستضيفون سبورتينغ كانساس سيتي هذا الأسبوع.

preReview.title: Vancouver Whitecaps x Sporting Kansas City: 'Podemos sempre confiar em Berhalter', diz Sorensen
preReview.description: Os Vancouver Whitecaps vão buscar retornar ao topo da Conferência Oeste quando receberem o Sporting Kansas City neste fim de semana.

QAData.question: Who won between Vancouver Whitecaps and Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 02:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Vancouver Whitecaps won 3–0 over Sporting Kansas City on Sun, 27 Jul 2025 02:30:00 GMT.
